response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and AI-agent infrastructure experience, particularly at re:cinq, where he contributes to Model Context Protocol (MCP) code generators and agentic workflows. While his AI/GenAI experience is not explicitly detailed as 8+ years, his technical breadth, leadership in developer tooling, and cloud-relevant skills (AWS, Kubernetes) align well with the role. His entrepreneurial and open-source background also suggests adaptability and initiative.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, agentic workflows) and developer tooling at re:cinq.
Strong full-stack expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud technologies (AWS, Kubernetes).
Demonstrated leadership in technical projects, including open-source platforms and mentorship (workshops, talks).
concerns: Lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions (GenAI experience is recent).
No direct mention of vector databases or RAG architectures in resume highlights.
Limited detail on customer-facing technical leadership or stakeholder management in AI contexts.
